books.title: The Song of the Lark
books.author: Willa Cather
books.summary: A young girl leaves her small-town life in 1890s Colorado to become a highly accomplished singer.

books.title: The Purple Land
books.author: W. H. Hudson
books.summary: An Englishman becomes embroiled in adventure, politics, and romance in 19th-century Uruguay.

books.title: Memoirs of a Foxhunting Man
books.author: Siegfried Sassoon
books.summary: A young boy comes of age in the idyllic English countryside just before the Great War tears Europe apart.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: The Road to Oz
books.author: L. Frank Baum
books.summary: A young girl takes a passerby down the road near her farm when they find themselves transported to another land.

books.title: The Surprising Adventures of Baron Munchausen
books.author: Rudolph Erich Raspe
books.summary: The legendary Baron Munchausen’s tall tales of wonder and adventure.

books.title: The Duchess of Malfi
books.author: John Webster
books.summary: A widow marries beneath her station and against her brothers’ orders and, enraged, they take their revenge.

books.title: On a Pincushion
books.author: Mary De Morgan
books.summary: The first collection of fairy tales by Mary De Morgan.

books.title: The Ambassadors
books.author: Henry James
books.summary: A middle-aged man travels to France to attempt to convince a younger man to return to America.

books.title: The Room in the Dragon Volant
books.author: J. Sheridan Le Fanu
books.summary: After an Englishman traveling in France meets a mysterious woman, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous intrigue.

books.title: South!
books.author: Ernest Shackleton
books.summary: A British expedition sets off to cross Antarctica, but when their ship is wrecked they have to face a long struggle for survival.

books.title: The Room in the Dragon Volant
books.author: J. Sheridan Le Fanu
books.summary: After an Englishman traveling in France meets a mysterious woman, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous intrigue.

books.title: Red Dusk and the Morrow
books.author: Paul Dukes
books.summary: A newly-minted secret agent is sent to pick up the pieces of Britain’s spy networks after they are shattered by the Red Terror.

books.title: Dialogues
books.author: Seneca
books.summary: Seneca’s dialogues and consolations, including “On Benefits,” examine living life through the lens of Stoic philosophy.

books.title: John Brown’s Body
books.author: Stephen Vincent Benét
books.summary: The sweeping tragedy of the American Civil War is chronicled through the interwoven experiences of soldiers and civilians from both the North and the South.

books.title: Crome Yellow
books.author: Aldous Huxley
books.summary: A young writer travels to an English countryside manor to spend the summer alongside a cast of outlandish leisure class intellectuals.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Frederik Pohl
books.summary: A collection of science fiction stories by Frederik Pohl ordered by date of publication.

books.title: American Indian Stories
books.author: Zitkála-Šá
books.summary: A collection of stories about Dakota Indians.

books.title: Verses on Various Occasions
books.author: John Henry Newman
books.summary: A collection of poems by John Henry Newman.

books.title: Through the Brazilian Wilderness
books.author: Theodore Roosevelt
books.summary: Theodore Roosevelt’s autobiographical account of his expedition into the uncharted depths of the Brazilian rainforest.
